---
title: "‘ “The Monthly Packet” : a study of C.M. Yonge's Editorial Aims and Practice’"
---

## ‘ “The Monthly Packet” : a study of C.M. Yonge's Editorial Aims and Practice’

**Author:** L. Amy De Gruchy
**Date:** 1986
**Imprint:** University of London MPhil thesis

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
